issue: Canonical GitHub backup sync script was missing from source HEAD and backup workspace after a snapshot deleted work/scripts/backup-sync-github.sh.
root_cause: The script had been restored only into the source working tree, but the backup script archives source HEAD, so uncommitted files were excluded from backup snapshots.
repair_actions: Committed restored script into source HEAD.
Ran the restored source-path backup script.
Verified backup workspace now contains work/scripts/backup-sync-github.sh.
source_commit: 8e03f30557 restore canonical GitHub backup sync script
operator_direction: Use /Users/openclaw/OpenClaw/work/scripts/backup-sync-github.sh for canonical backup. If a restored file must be included in backup snapshots, ensure it is committed into source HEAD first because the backup script archives HEAD.
